verificationManifest.title: Prime Intellect Series A and RL stack source-verification packet
verificationManifest.scope: Single candidate verification packet for Prime Intellect’s July 8, 2026 Series A and related technical artifact claims.

authority.basis: Manual capture from public sources plus human/agent review of claim posture.

provenanceChain.description: Primary source set selected and posture requirements defined.
Captured public Prime Intellect and press source receipts; preserved exact claim boundaries.
Reviewed for non-canon posture and DO_NOT_ADOPT_YET constraints.

claims.name: source-boundary
claims.value: Funding and stack claims preserved as SOURCE_CLAIM; press framing preserved as EXTERNALLY_REPORTED.

claims.name: adoption-scope
claims.value: No Prime Intellect, HUMMBL, BaseN, or Ownward canonization is performed in this packet.

claims.name: verification-status
claims.value: Performance and implementation claims are not independently validated in-repo.

claims.name: local-audit
claims.value: 4090/3090 and local feasibility items remain LOCAL_AUDIT_REQUIRED.

rules: Every claim mapped to this packet must cite an explicit source URL.
Claims derived from secondary interpretation must be labeled HUMMBL_INTERPRETATION.
No operational dependency is adopted from this packet.
